risk_prompt: Is irradiation data independently validated and based on bankable measurement sources?
Has curtailment risk been quantified and stress-tested?
Are panel degradation assumptions benchmarked and warranty-backed?
Are module supply, tariff, forced-labour and import restrictions addressed?
Is grid connection secured and is grid evacuation capacity sufficient?
Is wind resource assessment based on sufficient historical measurement?
Are turbine availability assumptions supported by OEM track record?
Are wake losses and turbine-layout assumptions independently validated?
Are land, environmental and aviation permits secured?
Is offshore construction risk reflected in contingency and delay assumptions?
Are vessel availability, installation windows and weather downtime considered?
Are offshore substation and export cable risks adequately addressed?
Are revenue streams contracted, regulated or merchant-exposed?
Are degradation and augmentation assumptions clearly modelled?
Are thermal runaway, fire safety and warranty provisions addressed?
Could market-rule changes affect arbitrage or ancillary service revenue?
Is there a credible long-term offtake arrangement?
Is electrolyzer technology proven at comparable scale?
Is renewable power supply secured and cost-competitive?
Are storage, compression, transport and safety requirements addressed?
Is exposure concentrated by country, technology, offtaker or counterparty?
Are platform governance, reserved matters and reporting rights adequate?
Are different technologies and geographies managed through clear operating model?
Are revenue, capex, debt and distributions exposed to currency mismatch?
Are tariff escalation and cost inflation assumptions internally consistent?
Is the credit profile of key counterparties adequately assessed?
Are permits, concessions, tariffs and change-in-law protections adequate?
Are downside cases linked to realistic risk drivers rather than arbitrary haircut assumptions?
